headline: Tesla leads Cars.com's 'Most American' car title yet again, and now tariffs play a part
summary: Tesla's (TSLA) Model 3 and Model Y lead Cars.com's "American-made Index" for the sixth year in a row. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian breaks down the details.

headline: Ford (F) Faces New US Import Rules For China Built Lincoln Nautilus
summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) now faces new U.S. import restrictions on its China-built Lincoln Nautilus SUV. The rules focus on national security concerns tied to connected vehicle software and Chinese-linked components. Imports will be subject to a U.S. Commerce Department approval process under upcoming regulations. For investors following Ford Motor, the latest import rules arrive as connected vehicles and software content become a larger part of the auto business. The Lincoln Nautilus SUV,...

headline: Is Rivian Automotive Stock A Smart Buy Right Now?
summary: The electric vehicle maker has a promising new vehicle and a mountain of cash to fund its future, but the road to profitability is paved with near-term losses and significant execution risk.
